title: gh#13: Tests: Fix mock-db updateChainable and centralize mock factories
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/13.
Backlog section: Tests.

## Problem

mock-db.ts updateChainable always resolves returning() to a populated row, hiding optimistic-lock failures. Also, createMockDb is duplicated across 4 test files with subtle differences.

## Identified by

Code quality review Run 1 — test-quality-analyzer (findings 1, 10)

## Fix

Accept an explicit returningResult parameter in updateChainable. Centralize all mock-db factories into __tests__/helpers/mock-db.ts.

## Files

- `packages/api/src/__tests__/helpers/mock-db.ts`
- `packages/api/src/__tests__/services/media.test.ts`
- `packages/api/src/__tests__/routes/media.test.ts`
- `packages/api/src/__tests__/routes/settings.test.ts`
reproduction: mock-db.ts updateChainable always resolves returning() to a populated row, hiding optimistic-lock failures. Also, createMockDb is duplicated across 4 test files with subtle differences.
recommendation: Accept an explicit returningResult parameter in updateChainable. Centralize all mock-db factories into __tests__/helpers/mock-db.ts.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: Imported from GitHub issue. Preserve or add focused regression coverage when the issue acceptance criteria calls for it.
